query: Review this data-access code and migration before I merge.
expected_behavior: Walks the patterns in references/sql-patterns.md over the in-scope SQL/EF code
Flags string-built SQL as SQL-INJECT (critical) with a FromSqlInterpolated/parameterized fix
Checks the migration for reversibility and destructive steps (SQL-MIGRATE)
Emits findings[] area:sql with before/after fixes; [GATE] on critical/high

query: Is this query going to be slow?
expected_behavior: Detects N+1 (navigation in a loop) → SQL-NPLUS1 with Include/projection fix
Flags non-sargable filters (function on indexed column) → SQL-INDEX
Suggests projection instead of loading whole entities (SQL-SELECTSTAR)

query: Check this migration drops a column — is that safe?
expected_behavior: Flags the destructive DROP as SQL-MIGRATE (high) and asks for a backfill/backup plan
Checks the Down method exists for reversibility
Recommends an idempotent script and links blazor/efcore-migration-revert-plan
